title: How Trump Failed to Secure the Strait of Hormuz in His Iran Deal
summary_full: President Trump signed an agreement that Iran said gave it control of the waterway — and global energy supplies. Now, Iran’s military is violently asserting authority.
summary_public: President Trump signed an agreement that Iran said gave it control of the waterway — and global energy supplies. Now, Iran’s military is violently asserting authority.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s military is violently asserting authority
